theme_and_archetype.core_philosophy: Diegetic, context-sensitive UI. The interface is part of the camera language. Muted stone/ash world that blooms into warm gold.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Cinematic framing. Heavy use of negative space. UI elements pushed to the edges.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use glassmorphism (crystal variant) for UI overlays: backdrop-blur-md bg-black/40 border border-white/10.
spacing_and_layout.ui_layer: absolute inset-0 z-10 pointer-events-none flex flex-col justify-between p-6 md:p-12

title_screen.layout: Centered vertical stack. Title in Cormorant Garamond, subtle glowing subtitle.
title_screen.buttons: Minimalist text buttons with 1px bottom border that expands on hover. No bulky boxes.

chapter_map.layout: Radial/Spiral arrangement using absolute positioning or a staggered masonry bento grid. Unlocked stages glow gold, locked stages are muted ash.

dialogue_box.layout: Bottom-center anchored. Wide but not full width (max-w-3xl). Glassmorphism background. Speaker name in serif, dialogue text in Outfit.
dialogue_box.interactions: Click to advance. Micro-animation: text fades in gently.

choice_cards.layout: Horizontal row or vertical stack above dialogue box. 1px borders, subtle gradients on hover based on the emotion tag.

heart_lantern_meter.visuals: Not a standard health bar. A circular or soft organic shape in top-left or top-right. Uses CSS radial-gradient to simulate a pulsing, breathing light.

mirror_lens.visuals: A toggle button that applies a screen-wide CSS filter (like backdrop-sepia or backdrop-hue-rotate) to the game canvas, revealing hidden glowing text.

journal_screen.layout: Book-like or split-screen overlay. Left side: Chapter title and reflection prompt. Right side: Minimalist text area (Shadcn customized) for user input.

motion_and_interaction.transitions: All state changes should use slow, filmic fades (transition-opacity duration-700).
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons and cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase border glow, rather than filling with solid color.
motion_and_interaction.lantern_breathing: Use CSS @keyframes for a continuous 'breathe' effect on the lantern meter (scaling 0.95 to 1.05 and opacity 0.8 to 1.0).

background_wasteland.description: Grey misty wasteland for Title Screen or Journal background layer.

heart_lantern_reference.description: Visual reference for the warm golden glow of the lantern against the dark void.

kavi_firefly_reference.description: Reference for Kavi, the firefly companion.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Project setup constraint: The codebase uses .js and .jsx files, NOT TypeScript. Do not create .tsx files.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Initialize a React overlay on top of the Phaser 3 canvas. Phaser handles the world, React handles the narrative UI.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Every interactive element (buttons, choice cards, journal input, map nodes) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., `data-testid="start-game-button"`).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: For the mobile touch controls, create circular, semi-transparent buttons in the bottom corners with pointer-events-auto.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not use standard Shadcn cards. Strip all default borders/shadows and apply the 'Crystal' glassmorphism styling.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Phaser game should start heavily desaturated. UI elements provide the only color (Gold/Amber) initially.
